creator: exploringlondon
caption:
Here are 9 amazing things to do with kids in London and we’ve got loads of discounts codes for you too, have a look at the specifics below! Share this with someone who would love it 🥰 

1. @cleopatraexperience_ Immersive storytelling and real artefacts!
👥 All ages welcome
🎟️ Tickets linked in bio: Get 10% off tickets on @fever_uk with code EXPLORINGLONDON10

2. @prisonisland_experience.uk Take on 31 thrilling challenge cells!
👥 Ages 7+
🎟️ Tickets linked in bio: Get 10% off tickets on @fever_uk with code EXPLORINGLONDON10

3. @boomlab_experience Take on 6 immersive rooms in a live video game experience!
👥 Ages 12+
🎟️ Tickets linked in bio: Get 10% off tickets on @fever_uk with code EXPLORINGLONDON10

4. @london_paradoxmuseum 50 interactive exhibits that will challenge your reality!
👥 All ages welcome
🎟️ Tickets linked in bio: Get 10% off tickets on @fever_uk with code EXPLORINGLONDON10

5. @monopolylifesized Immersive gaming experience based on the iconic board game!
👥 Ages 9+
🎟️ Tickets linked in bio

6. @framelessldn Immersive art gallery with 4 multi-sensory galleries
👥 All ages welcome
🎟️ Tickets from £28 per person

7. @bubbleplanetexperience Immersive experience where you’ll surround yourself in bubble themed rooms plus VR!
👥 All ages welcome
🎟️ Tickets linked in bio: Get 10% off tickets on @fever_uk with code EXPLORINGLONDON10

8. @banksylimitless 250+ works including certified originals and one of a kind pieces
👥 All ages welcome
🎟️ Tickets linked in bio: Get 10% off tickets on @fever_uk with code EXPLORINGLONDON10

9. @mundopixarlondon Immersive yourself in Pixar’s worlds of your favourite characters!
👥 All ages welcome
🎟️ Tickets from £26.50

#feverambassador

transcription.text: We're making our fame Only fight, hustle, love, making my name Sometimes I think, sitting on trains Every step I get I'm clocking that game Everyone's a winner, we're making our fame We're only fight, hustle, love, making my name That's what I wanna do I'm shaking my head That's what I wanna do
